message:
feat(connectors): complete typed OperationInfo migration for all 82 connectors

Migrates remaining 29 connectors to typed OperationInfo with AgentHint:
- Workspace: asana, clickup, monday, todoist, trello
- DevTools: bitbucket, gitlab, datadog, grafana, sentry
- Storage: box, dropbox
- Automation: cron, make, n8n, zapier, webhook-receiver
- Misc: docusign, evernote, logseq, mcp-bridge, pandadoc,
  postgresql, redis, roam, whisper

All 82 connectors now use typed metadata (0 Json remaining).
CONNECTOR_INVENTORY updated: 82 Typed / 0 Json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
